_comment: Mutation testing for @ternity/api. Each Stryker sandbox runs vitest's globalSetup independently → each gets its own Testcontainers Postgres (random port → no conflict). Per-sandbox isolation works because test/global-setup.ts writes the URL handoff file under `cwd`, and Stryker gives every sandbox its own cwd. Concurrency is conservative (2) — each running sandbox holds ~250MB for its container. testRunner is vitest, which inherits the harness's fileParallelism:false (the suite has one shared container per vitest run).
